docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,475.00 FILED BY HUNG, MEI AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, DAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-26-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-26-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MEI HUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAN LIU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER CONNIE CHUNG VIA ZOOM. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. THIS CASE IS HEARD WITH CSM-21-864096 & 20-863868. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2021 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2021 - CONTINUED FOR TO BE HEARD WITH CASE 21-864096 TO MAY-26-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MEI HUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAN LIU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER YANG YANG (DAUGHTER OF DEFENDANT). THE INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK: R.SAHATJIAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNG, MEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIU, DAN $819.89 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $864.89, SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUNG, MEI AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, DAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED DEC-09-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, DAN
ORDER CASE CONTINUED TO BE HEARD WITH CSM-21-864096 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.).
STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY HUNG, MEI LIU, DAN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, DAN
